infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Paddles Up uses your location to show nearby pickleball courts, verify you are at a court before checking in or reporting availability, and automatically check you in when you arrive at a court. Your location is only used while the app is open and is never stored or shared.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Paddles Up needs access to your photo library so you can choose a profile picture or upload court photos.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Paddles Up needs access to your camera so you can take court photos at the venue.
